SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-01-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-01-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF SATWIK ANJANEYA PACHIGOLLA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 923 FOLSOM ACQUISITION LLC IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-01-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACHIGOLLA, SATWIK ANJANEYA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 923 FOLSOM ACQUISITION LLC $3,178.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,243.00, $2000 IS FOR BAD FAITH FAILURE TO RETURN SECURITY DEPOSIT; $1000 IS SECURITY DEPOSIT; $178 IS REIMBURSEMENT FOR ORDINARY CLEAR AND TEAR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
